{{Infobox character
| name = Murin
| abilities = {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|sense and possibly manipulate thoughts}}
| affiliations = {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Avernus]], [[The Territory|the Territory]]}}
| appears_in = Traveler's Gate
| introduced = [[City of Light (novel)|City of Light]]
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|Murin is a raven gifted to [[Leah]] by the [[Incarnation]] of [[Avernus]]. Though she was intended as a tool for navigating the [[Damascan]] court, Murin possesses the specialized ability to read minds. She is physically marked by a crimson eye and serves as a spy, though she shares a unique mental bond with [[Leah]] that connects the two through a visible red line. Beyond her telepathic capabilities, Murin can communicate her thoughts and opinions to [[Leah]] through mental projections and sounds. She acts as an advisor, offering reassurance or warnings regarding combat and the intentions of others.}}

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|Murin is a raven bound to [[Avernus]] that accompanies [[Leah]]. This bird, which produces a sound like a gurgling purr, possesses the ability to sense and potentially manipulate thoughts. Murin maintains a connection to both [[Leah]] and the [[Territory]]. During their travels, the raven internally judges [[Leah]] as an idiot for her tendency to engage in direct combat.}}

{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Murin]] is a raven that makes a sound like a gurgling purr.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c19">''City of Light'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Murin]] is a raven that can sense and possibly manipulate thoughts.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c24">''City of Light'', chapter 24</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Murin]] is a bird that accompanies [[Leah]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c24" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Murin]] is a raven bound to [[Avernus]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c25">''City of Light'', chapter 25</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Murin]] is connected to [[Leah]] and the [[Territory]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c25" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Murin]] thinks [[Leah]] is an idiot for fighting directly.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c27">''City of Light'', chapter 27</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate characters]]
[[Category:Avernus]]
